title: [PATCH]: Updated patch order for the NPM packages
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Shorter names, faster models
gist.blurb: Renamed our NPM packages to save you keystrokes. `oh-my-pollicode` becomes `ompc`, and `mcp` takes the stage with `claude-fast` as the default.
gist.summary: Renamed NPM packages for brevity (`ompc`, `mcp`) and updated the default model to `claude-fast`.
gist.impact: Developers should update imports to the new package names; new installations default to the faster Claude model.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot in a cozy shipping room, relabeling boxes with shorter names. The robot holds a label gun. Boxes are glowing slightly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and a monitor-headed robot in a shipping room, putting new short labels on boxes. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Pixel text on boxes reads 'MCP' and 'OMPC'. Warm lighting, chunky sprites, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and organized.
